amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 53 — paragraph 1 d (new)
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 53 — paragraph 1 d (new)

## Text proposed by the Commission

*(no text)*

## Amendment of the European Parliament

1 d. AI regulatory sandboxes shall, in accordance with criteria set out in Article 53a, provide for a controlled environment that fosters innovation and facilitates the development, testing and validation of innovative AI systems for a limited time before their placement on the market or putting into service pursuant to a specific plan agreed between the prospective providers and the establishing authority;
parliament_text: 1 d. AI regulatory sandboxes shall, in accordance with criteria set out in Article 53a, provide for a controlled environment that fosters innovation and facilitates the development, testing and validation of innovative AI systems for a limited time before their placement on the market or putting into service pursuant to a specific plan agreed between the prospective providers and the establishing authority;
